mnemonics: D-CODE: Document Classification, Organization, Discovery, and Extraction.
keyPoints: Document Preprocessing is the crucial first step of cleaning and standardizing text.
Feature Extraction transforms text into numerical data (e.g., TF-IDF, word embeddings) that machine learning models can understand.
The goal is to assign a label or category (classification) or extract structured information (information extraction) from the new document.
commonMistakes: Skipping preprocessing steps like lowercasing or stop word removal, leading to noisy data.
Treating the new document as part of the training data during feature extraction, causing data leakage and over-optimistic results.
